records.question: Who is the teacher named Anne Walker who is exactly 41 years old and has course arrangements?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
WHERE teacher.age = '41' AND teacher.name = 'Anne Walker'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Teacher_ID
FROM teacher t
INNER JOIN course_arrange ca ON t.Teacher_ID = ca.Teacher_ID
WHERE t.Age = '41' AND t.Name = 'Anne Walker'

records.question: Who is Anne Walker from Little Lever Urban District, aged 41, teaching students in grade 7 or higher?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
WHERE teacher.age = '41' AND course_arrange.grade >= 7 AND teacher.hometown = 'Little Lever Urban District' AND teacher.name = 'Anne Walker'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Teacher_ID
FROM teacher t
INNER JOIN course_arrange ca ON t.Teacher_ID = ca.Teacher_ID
WHERE t.Age = '41'
AND t.Hometown = 'Little Lever Urban District'
AND t.Name = 'Anne Walker'
AND ca.Grade >= 7

records.question: Which teachers who are exactly 26 years old have courses assigned to them?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
JOIN course ON course_arrange.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE teacher.age = '26'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Teacher_ID
FROM teacher t
INNER JOIN course_arrange ca ON t.Teacher_ID = ca.Teacher_ID
INNER JOIN course c ON ca.Course_ID = c.Course_ID
WHERE t.Age = '26'

records.question: Which teachers named Lucy Wong, aged 39 and from Turton Urban District, teach Music courses at grade 4 or below?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT teacher.teacher_id FROM teacher
JOIN course_arrange ON teacher.teacher_id = course_arrange.teacher_id
JOIN course ON course_arrange.course_id = course.course_id
WHERE course.course = 'Music' AND course_arrange.grade <= 4 AND teacher.name = 'Lucy Wong' AND teacher.hometown = 'Turton Urban District' AND teacher.age = '39'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT t.Teacher_ID
FROM teacher t
INNER JOIN course_arrange ca ON t.Teacher_ID = ca.Teacher_ID
INNER JOIN course c ON ca.Course_ID = c.Course_ID
WHERE t.Name = 'Lucy Wong'
AND t.Hometown = 'Turton Urban District'
AND t.Age = '39'
AND ca.Grade <= 4
AND c.Course = 'Music'
